data.title: Supernova Metals Strengthens Advisory Board with Industry Veteran
data.description:
An announcement from Supernova Metals ( (TSE:SUPR) ) is now available.

Supernova Metals Corp. has appointed Tim O’Hanlon to its Strategic Advisory Board, leveraging his extensive experience in the African oil and gas sector to enhance its exploration activities in the Orange Basin. This strategic move is expected to strengthen Supernova’s operations and market positioning, as O’Hanlon’s expertise and relationships in Africa are seen as invaluable assets for the company’s ongoing investments.

More about Supernova Metals

Supernova Metals Corp. operates in the oil and gas industry, focusing on exploration opportunities, particularly in the Orange Basin, a prominent oil exploration region.

YTD Price Performance: 80.0%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$6.89M

data.title: Core Molding Technologies Unveils New Investor Presentation
data.description:
Core Molding Technologies ( (CMT) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 13, 2025, Core Molding Technologies announced that its executive management team, including CEO David Duvall and CFO John Zimmer, will use a new presentation in discussions with investors and analysts. This move aims to enhance investor relations and provide insights into the company’s strategic direction and market opportunities. The presentation highlights the company’s focus on growth through sales force development, technological advancements, and potential acquisitions, indicating a proactive approach to expanding its market presence and addressing customer needs.

More about Core Molding Technologies

Core Molding Technologies, headquartered in Columbus, OH, operates in the engineered materials and manufacturing solutions industry. The company focuses on providing innovative and reliable solutions across various sectors, including transportation, power sports, and industrial utilities. With a diversified portfolio and long-term relationships with blue-chip companies, Core Molding Technologies is a market leader with a significant presence in North America.

data.title: Vale S.A. Submits Compliance Report to SEC
data.description:
An update from Vale SA ( (VALE) ) is now available.

On March 12, 2025, Vale S.A. submitted a report as a foreign private issuer to the United States Securities and Exchange Commission, in compliance with the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. This submission, signed by Thiago Lofiego, the Director of Investor Relations, underscores Vale’s ongoing commitment to regulatory compliance and transparency in its operations.

More about Vale SA

Vale S.A. is a Brazilian multinational corporation engaged primarily in metals and mining. It is one of the largest logistics operators in Brazil and is among the largest producers of iron ore and nickel in the world.

data.title: Power Grid Appoints New Secretarial Auditor for FY 2024-25
data.description:
Power Grid Corporation of India Limited ( (IN:POWERGRID) ) has provided an announcement.

Power Grid Corporation of India Limited has announced the appointment of M/s. Kumar Naresh Sinha & Associates as the Secretarial Auditor for the financial year 2024-25. This decision, made during the board meeting on March 13, 2025, reflects the company’s commitment to maintaining robust compliance and governance standards. The appointed firm, led by Naresh Kumar Sinha, brings extensive experience in corporate governance, having worked with major public sector enterprises, which is expected to enhance Power Grid’s operational integrity and stakeholder confidence.

More about Power Grid Corporation of India Limited

Power Grid Corporation of India Limited operates in the energy sector, primarily focusing on the transmission of electricity across India. It is a central public sector enterprise that plays a crucial role in the country’s power infrastructure, ensuring the efficient and reliable delivery of electricity.

data.title: Trendzon Holdings Announces HK$40 Million Bond Issuance
data.description:
Trendzon Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:1865) ) has shared an update.

Trendzon Holdings Group Limited has announced the successful placement and issuance of bonds amounting to HK$40,000,000. The company entered into a Placing Agreement with Cheer Union, appointing them as the placing agent, and a Subscription Agreement with Central Point Holding Development Limited as the subscriber. This strategic move is intended to provide shareholders and potential investors with the latest business developments and strengthen the company’s financial position.

More about Trendzon Holdings Group Limited

Trendzon Holdings Group Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability, operating within the financial sector. The company focuses on bond issuance and related financial services, aiming to attract investors and enhance its market presence.

data.title: Marvel Biosciences’ MB-204 Shows Promise in Rett Syndrome Study
data.description:
Marvel Biosciences Corp ( (TSE:MRVL) ) has issued an announcement.

Marvel Biosciences Corp announced promising results from a preclinical study of its lead compound MB-204 for Rett syndrome, conducted with the iBraiN Institute. MB-204 significantly outperformed the currently approved treatment, Trofinetide, in reversing social and behavioral deficiencies in Mecp2 mice, suggesting it could be a promising treatment for Rett Syndrome. The company plans to publish and present the data at a scientific conference.

More about Marvel Biosciences Corp

Marvel Biosciences Corp, along with its subsidiary Marvel Biotechnology Inc, operates in the biotechnology industry. The company focuses on developing innovative treatments for neurological conditions, with its lead compound MB-204 being a primary product.

Average Trading Volume: 33,340

data.title: Vale S.A. Files SEC Report for March 2025
data.description:
Vale SA ( (VALE) ) has provided an update.

On March 12, 2025, Vale S.A. filed a report with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission, fulfilling its obligations under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. This filing, signed by the Director of Investor Relations, Thiago Lofiego, indicates Vale’s compliance with regulatory requirements, potentially impacting investor confidence and maintaining its transparency in financial reporting.

More about Vale SA

Vale S.A. is a Brazilian multinational corporation engaged in metals and mining, and one of the largest logistics operators in Brazil. The company is a major producer of iron ore and nickel, and it also operates in the coal, copper, and manganese sectors, with a significant focus on global markets.

data.title: AIB Group PLC Announces Changes in Voting Rights
data.description:
AIB Group ( (AIBRF) ) has shared an update.

AIB Group PLC has announced a change in the voting rights associated with its shares, following an acquisition or disposal of financial instruments by Bank of America Corporation. The notification indicates that the threshold of 4% was crossed on March 12, 2025, with the total voting rights now standing at 4.192%. This adjustment in holdings could influence AIB’s market dynamics and stakeholder interests, reflecting the strategic movements of major financial entities in the market.

More about AIB Group

AIB Group PLC is a prominent financial services provider based in Ireland, primarily offering banking products and services. The company focuses on retail, business, and corporate banking, serving a diverse range of customers in the Irish market and beyond.
